title: Did I Get Robbed?
description: Displays a chat log and visual overlay if previously opened chest items are missing/stolen.
body: # DidIGetRobbed A Minecraft Fabric mod that helps you detect if items are missing from your chests, barrels, and shulker boxes. ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c286f050eaabe7e6c686cb40687126b7155c1666.png) [⭐️ This is a featured mod! ⭐️](https://modrinth.com/collection/7VVhDCVM) ## Features - **Visual Overlay**: Shows ghost items in slots where items are missing - **Chat Notifications**: Displays a detailed list of missing items in chat with enchantment support - **Multi-World Support**: Works in multiplayer, and even realms! You can access the config by doing /didigetrobbed ## Known Issues / Limitations - Some component data isn't supported yet - Ghost items don't display the item count (but chat does) - Shulker boxes are very broken if you move them around - **Recommended to disable shulker boxes with /didigetrobbed** - To track your shulker boxes, leave the word "shulker", or "box" in the name! ## FAQ: - Q: How do I migrate my stored items to a different minecraft folder? - A: Just copy over the DidIGetRobbed folder!
